  Use Conventional Commit prefix in the PR title:
  feat: | fix: | chore: | docs: | refactor: | test: | ci: | perf:
  Example: "feat(menu): add specials.json to make weekly special data, not code"
-->

## What changed

<!-- One paragraph. The reader should know what this PR does without reading the diff. -->

## Why

<!-- The motivation. Link the issue: "Closes #N" / "Refs #N". -->

## Test plan

<!-- How a reviewer (or future-you) verifies this works. Bullets, not prose. -->

- [ ] ...

## Risk

<!-- What could break? What's the rollback path? Empty if truly trivial. -->

## Notes for the reviewer

<!-- Optional. Surprising choices, things you considered and rejected, follow-ups. -->
